general.launchAtLoginDesc: Start Atoll automatically when you log in. Requires the installed Atoll.app from Applications.

usage.displayPricingDesc: Choose tokens or cost for each counter, and edit model rates.
usage.tokenActivityDesc: Daily token heatmap and usage history.

integrations.agentHooksDesc: Connect Claude Code, Codex, and future local agents.

display.smallFoldedIslandDesc: Use the smaller Windows folded island so pages under the top-center edge stay easier to click.
display.foldedIconLimitDescDefault: Max session icons in compact mode; extras spill to the right beside tokens.
display.foldedIconLimitDescLimited: Up to {{limit}} icons fit on this display; extras spill to the right beside tokens.
display.subagentDisplayLimitDesc: Max subagent chips shown per session; extras collapse to ×N.
display.sessionAutoArchiveDesc: Minutes before idle sessions are auto-archived. Pinned sessions are exempt.
display.subagentAutoArchiveDesc: Minutes after completion before subagents are auto-archived.

mascot.activityIntervalDesc: Minutes between random mascot activity switches.
mascot.activityDurationDesc: How long each activity plays before switching.

usagePage.foldedCounterDesc: Active session counter in the folded island.
usagePage.expandedCounterDesc: Today's total in the expanded island header.
usagePage.settingsBadgeDesc: Summary shown on the Token activity entry card.
usagePage.heatmapDesc: Daily totals, tooltips, and trend charts on Token activity.
